message:
fix(testutil): fix line number to string conversion bug

Fixed string(rune(lineNum)) which converted line number to Unicode
character instead of numeric string. Changed to strconv.Itoa(lineNum).

Also added internal/logs/claude_test.go to safe exceptions - it uses
t.TempDir() for all writes and only references UserHomeDir for path
verification (false positive from cross-line regex match).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
